🔞 18+ 🌲 Forest Runner 🥚 Scratch Game

RUNNINGMEN

Jump over eggs. Survive the forest. How long can you last? A fast-paced reaction game built in Scratch — simple to learn, hard to master.

WHAT IS THIS GAME?

Running Men is a side-scrolling runner game created in Scratch. You control a character sprinting through a lush forest environment, and your goal is simple — jump over incoming eggs before they hit you. The further you go, the higher your score. Easy to pick up, impossible to put down.

⌨️

Keyboard Controls

Use arrow keys or WASD to control movement and the spacebar to jump over obstacles.

🥚

Egg Obstacles

Eggs appear at varying speeds as obstacles. Touch them and you lose — jump over them to survive.

📈

Score System

Every successful dodge earns you points. Try to beat your high score and outlast the competition.

🌲

Forest World

Beautiful hand-drawn forest backgrounds bring the game world to life with vibrant animations.

⚠️ Disclaimer

This game is intended for players 18 years of age or older. The development team assumes no responsibility for any consequences, damages, or outcomes arising from the use of this game. By playing, you agree to take full personal responsibility for your experience.

ABOUT THE GAME

Running Men is a browser-based runner game developed in Scratch as a school project. The game takes place in a vibrant, animated forest where the player controls a running character who must jump over egg obstacles to survive as long as possible.

The concept is rooted in classic endless-runner mechanics — speed, timing, and reflexes are everything. There is no finish line. Only the next egg standing between you and a new high score.

🎮 Platform

Web / Scratch / PC — no installation required. Play directly in your browser.

DOCUMENTATION

Contents

  • Game Goal

1. Overview

Game Name: Running Men

Running Men is a game created in Scratch that takes place in a forest. The player controls a character running through the forest environment, with the primary objective being to jump over eggs and avoid contact with them.

2. Gameplay Elements

  • Main Character — Controlled by the player, runs through the forest
  • Eggs (Egg, Egg2, …) — Obstacles that the player must jump over
  • Forest Background — The visual environment of the game

3. Controls

🎮 Keyboard: Arrow keys or WASD for movement

⬆️ Jump: Spacebar or jump button to leap over obstacles

🖱️ Mouse: Click interactions for menus

4. Game Mechanics

  • Eggs function as obstacles in the player's path
  • The player must jump over them to avoid contact
  • Upon touching an egg, the player may lose or lose points

5. Game Goal

  • Avoid the eggs
  • Survive as long as possible
  • Achieve the highest possible score

6. Development Team

🧑‍💻

Vorel

Lead Programmer

Responsible for the core game programming logic and Scratch implementation.

🎨

Vinichenko

Programmer & Designer

Assisted with programming and handled the visual design of the game.

📝

Dan

Documentation

Created and maintained the project documentation you are reading now.

📣

Barzul

Promotion

Handled marketing, promotion, and outreach for the game project.

7. Summary

Running Men is a simple side-scrolling jumping game in Scratch, focused on player reaction time and obstacle avoidance. Its minimalist design makes it easy to understand instantly while remaining engaging and challenging to master.
